title: 2.2 practice
description: Practice what you learned in lesson 2.2.
topic_path: History of the Universe and Earth

assessment_items.question_content:
**What were the earliest forms of matter in our Universe?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What were the first two elements to form once the Universe expanded and cooled?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What is cosmic microwave background radiation (cosmic background radiation)?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Energy released shortly after the Big Bang
Energy released during the fusion of hydrogen nuclei in the center of stars
Energy used in the laboratory to sterilize equipment

assessment_items.question_content:
**What are two important pieces of evidence we have for the Big Bang?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Hubble’s and Lemaitre’s expanding Universe model and cosmic microwave background radiation
The fact that we have multiple Universes to compare and study, and the cosmic microwave background radiation
Photos of the event itself and Hubble’s and Lemaitre’s expanding Universe model
The abundance of hydrogen, helium, and lithium found in the Universe and a shrinking model of the Universe
